name: Write a performance test for a sorting function
description: Tests that the agent creates a proper matlab.perftest.TestCase with measurement boundaries, parameterization, RNG seeding, and local variable pattern
prompt: I have a custom sorting function called mySort(data) that I want to benchmark at different array sizes (1000, 10000, 100000 elements). Write me a performance test class that measures it properly.

context.setup: addpath the evals/files directory before running the generated test

assertions.description: Generated test class is valid MATLAB that passes checkcode
Subclasses matlab.perftest.TestCase
assertions.expected: matlab.perftest.TestCase

assertions.description: Uses keepMeasuring or startMeasuring/stopMeasuring for measurement boundary
assertions.expected: keepMeasuring or startMeasuring/stopMeasuring appears in the test method

assertions.description: Data setup is in TestMethodSetup (not just before startMeasuring in the test method)
assertions.expected: Data generation (randn, rand, or array creation) is in a TestMethodSetup method, not in the Test method body

assertions.description: Uses MethodSetupParameter (not TestParameter) since setup consumes the size
assertions.expected: MethodSetupParameter

assertions.description: Seeds RNG before generating random data for deterministic results
assertions.expected: rng() call appears before rand/randn in TestMethodSetup

assertions.description: Copies testCase property to local variable before measurement boundary
assertions.expected: A local variable assignment like data = testCase.inputData (or similar) appears before the keepMeasuring loop or startMeasuring call

assertions.description: Test runs with TimeExperiment.withFixedSampleSize(2) and produces valid MeasurementResult with non-zero timing for all testpoints

name: Fix a performance test with setup inside measurement
description: Tests that the agent identifies and fixes the anti-pattern of including setup code inside the measurement boundary

context.setup: No additional files needed — fft is a built-in MATLAB function

assertions.description: Fixed test class is valid MATLAB
Identifies data generation inside keepMeasuring as the problem
assertions.expected: Explains that randn() inside the measurement loop adds noise and inflates timing

assertions.description: Moves data generation to TestMethodSetup
assertions.expected: Data generation (randn) appears in a TestMethodSetup method, not inside keepMeasuring or as a local variable in the Test method

assertions.description: No data generation inside keepMeasuring in the fixed version
assertions.expected: randn inside the while testCase.keepMeasuring loop

assertions.description: Seeds RNG in setup for deterministic data
assertions.expected: rng() call (e.g. rng(42, 'twister')) appears before randn in TestMethodSetup

assertions.description: Fixed test runs with TimeExperiment.withFixedSampleSize(2) and produces valid MeasurementResult with non-zero timing

name: Use correct parameter type for setup-consumed parameters
description: Tests that the agent uses MethodSetupParameter (not TestParameter) when the parameter is consumed by TestMethodSetup
prompt: I want to write a performance test for my image processing function processImage(img) that tests with different image sizes: 256x256, 512x512, and 1024x1024. The test should create a random image of the specified size in setup, then measure processImage in the test method. Write the test class.

context.setup: addpath the evals/files directory. No toolboxes required.

assertions.description: Generated test class is valid MATLAB
Uses MethodSetupParameter (not TestParameter) since setup consumes it
assertions.expected: MethodSetupParameter

assertions.description: Does not use TestParameter for the size parameter that setup consumes
assertions.expected: TestParameter used for the image size that is consumed in TestMethodSetup

assertions.description: Image creation happens in TestMethodSetup, measurement only contains processImage
assertions.expected: rand or randn for image creation in TestMethodSetup; only processImage inside measurement boundary

assertions.description: Seeds RNG before generating random image data
assertions.expected: rng() call appears before rand/randn in TestMethodSetup

assertions.description: Copies testCase property to local variable before measurement
assertions.expected: A local variable like img = testCase.testImage appears before the measurement boundary, and the measurement uses the local variable not testCase.property

assertions.description: Test runs with TimeExperiment.withFixedSampleSize(2) and produces valid MeasurementResult for all 3 image sizes with non-zero timing

name: Write an application-level benchmark for a signal processing workflow
description: Tests that the agent produces a workflow-level (ALB) benchmark with no parameterization, startMeasuring/stopMeasuring, realistic data, and TestClassSetup
prompt: I have a signal processing pipeline with three functions: designAndApplyFilter(signal, fs, cutoffHz) for lowpass filtering, computeSpectrogram(signal, fs, windowLen, overlap) for time-frequency analysis, and detectSpectralPeaks(signal, fs, minPeakHeight, minSepHz) for peak detection. My typical workflow is: filter a 2-minute audio recording at 44100 Hz with a 5000 Hz cutoff, then compute its spectrogram (window=2048, overlap=1024), then detect peaks above 1e3 with 100 Hz separation. Write an application-level performance benchmark that measures this end-to-end workflow. I want a single testpoint — no parameterization.

context.setup: addpath the evals/files directory. No toolboxes required.

assertions.description: Generated test class is valid MATLAB that passes checkcode
Subclasses matlab.perftest.TestCase
assertions.expected: matlab.perftest.TestCase

assertions.description: Uses startMeasuring/stopMeasuring (not keepMeasuring) since workflow takes >10ms
assertions.expected: startMeasuring and stopMeasuring are used. keepMeasuring is NOT used.

assertions.description: No parameterization — single representative testpoint
assertions.expected: MethodSetupParameter or TestParameter property block

assertions.description: Data setup is in TestClassSetup or TestMethodSetup, not inside measurement
assertions.expected: Signal generation (randn or synthetic signal creation) happens in a TestClassSetup or TestMethodSetup method, outside the startMeasuring/stopMeasuring boundary

assertions.description: Measurement contains a multi-step workflow (filter/spectrogram/peaks pattern)
assertions.expected: Between startMeasuring and stopMeasuring there are calls to designAndApplyFilter, computeSpectrogram, and detectSpectralPeaks (or at least 2 of the 3)

assertions.description: Includes lightweight verification after stopMeasuring
assertions.expected: A verifyNotEmpty, verifyTrue, or similar assertion appears after stopMeasuring

assertions.description: Test runs with TimeExperiment.withFixedSampleSize(2) producing a valid MeasurementResult with timing in 0.1-30s range

name: Write unit-level performance tests for internal functions of myAudioProcessingCode
description: Tests that the agent produces focused unit-level performance tests with parameterization to isolate individual operations
prompt: I have a function myAudioProcessingCode(signal, fs, options) that internally calls three sub-functions: designAndApplyFilter(signal, fs, cutoffHz), computeSpectrogram(signal, fs, windowLen, overlap), and detectSpectralPeaks(signal, fs, minPeakHeight, minSepHz). I want to write unit-level performance tests that benchmark each sub-function independently at 3 signal lengths: 1 second (44100 samples), 10 seconds (441000 samples), and 100 seconds (4410000 samples) at fs=44100. Write the performance test class with one test method per sub-function.

context.setup: addpath the evals/files directory. No toolboxes required. myAudioProcessingCode.m shows the pipeline; the unit tests should benchmark each sub-function in isolation.

assertions.description: Generated test class is valid MATLAB that passes checkcode
Subclasses matlab.perftest.TestCase
assertions.expected: matlab.perftest.TestCase

assertions.description: Has separate test methods for each function (not one method testing all three)
assertions.expected: At least 3 separate function definitions in the methods (Test) block, one for each of designAndApplyFilter, computeSpectrogram, and detectSpectralPeaks

assertions.description: Parameterized by signal length using MethodSetupParameter
assertions.expected: MethodSetupParameter

assertions.description: Data generation is in TestMethodSetup with RNG seeding
assertions.expected: rng() call appears before randn/rand in a TestMethodSetup method that creates the test signal

assertions.description: Each test method measures only one function call
assertions.expected: Inside each measurement boundary, only one of the three functions is called — no bundling multiple functions in the same measurement

assertions.description: Copies testCase properties to local variables before measurement
assertions.expected: Local variable assignments (e.g. signal = testCase.signal) appear before the measurement boundary in each test method

assertions.description: Test runs with TimeExperiment.withFixedSampleSize(2) producing valid MeasurementResult for all 9 testpoints (3 functions x 3 sizes) with non-zero timing
